TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bazi', title = bazi', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bazi'} }

S.FORM: bazi' baziyи«ӢиІ· вҶ’yaya musa su sinkina ga baziy cikay bwax ha... ... mbaziyиІ· вҶ’yaya musa su inu? musa si mbaziy cikay bwax.. ... mtbaziyиіЈ вҶ’nanu cyux su pcwagun? nyux saku mtbaziy qwau na tayal.. ... sptbaziyиіЈжҺүвҶ’yaqix qu turaq qani la, sptbaziy maku ki plmujan, aki kya cika pila bbazi mu ramat.. ....

bazi' baziyи«ӢиІ· вҶ’yaya musa su sinkina ga baziy cikay bwax ha... ... mbaziyиІ· вҶ’yaya musa su inu? musa si mbaziy cikay bwax.. ... mtbaziyиіЈ вҶ’nanu cyux su pcwagun? nyux saku mtbaziy qwau na tayal.. ... sptbaziyиіЈжҺүвҶ’yaqix qu turaq qani la, sptbaziy maku ki plmujan, aki kya cika pila bbazi mu ramat.. ....
S.PHON: ОІaziК” ОІazij** *jaja mus~Й•a s~Й•u s~Й•inkina ЙЈa ОІazij КҰ~КЁikaj ОІwax Д§a... ... mОІazij* *jaja mus~Й•a s~Й•u inu? mus~Й•a s~Й•i mОІazij КҰ~КЁikaj ОІwax.. ... mtОІazij* *nanu КҰ~КЁjux s~Й•u pКҰ~КЁwaЙЈun? njux s~Й•aku mtОІazij qwau na tajal.. ... s~Й•ptОІazij***jaqix qu turaq qani la, s~Й•ptОІazij maku ki plmujan, aki kja КҰ~КЁika pila ОІОІazi mu ramat.. ....
